title: Dirty Slabs
description: This mod adds slabs and stairs for Dirt related Blocks
body:
### Description
This mod adds slab and stair variants for Dirt, Coarse Dirt, Rooted Dirt, Podzol and Mycelium. These Blocks have never been implemented by Mojang but should definetely be part of the Game. This mod therefor fills in the gap Mojang never filled and allows Players to make smoother terrain and better dirt paths. All Stairs and Slabs have their respective crafting recipes.

All stair Blocks connect with other Stairs and Slabs can be stacked as normal.
